name: Storn the Burly
bio:
Physical Appearance: Nord male. Wears leveled light armor including cuirass and boots, with possible gauntlets, greaves, and helmet. Carries huntsman vest, huntsman leather pants, and huntsman moccasins. Armed with a longsword.
Race: Nord
Personality Keywords: treacherous, criminal, betrayer, greedy
Role: Storn the Burly is a rogue and former employee at Lelles' Quality Merchandise. Along with his companions Aenvir and Dranas Lerano, he has been robbing Lelles' store regularly over the last few months. The Fighters Guild has been hired to stop them.
Home Location Information: None - he loiters outside Lelles' Quality Merchandise until it's time to break in.
Daily Routine: Storn loiters outside the shop until it's time to break in, which is between 10pm and 4am.
His Betrayal: Storn was a trusted employee at Lelles' Quality Merchandise. Norbert Lelles even trusted him to open up the shop in the mornings. Despite this trust, Storn turned to robbing the very store he worked for, using his insider knowledge and access (including a key to the store) to facilitate the thefts.
His Crime: Storn and his two companions have been conducting regular break-ins over the last few months, stealing from their former employer. They strike between 10pm and 4am when the shop is closed.
Personality - The Inside Man: Storn is treacherous and greedy, betraying the trust of an employer who relied on him. He used his position as a trusted employee with key access to facilitate thefts, turning insider knowledge into criminal opportunity. His employer is shocked and amazed when learning of the betrayal, unable to imagine what turned him to a life of crime.
author: Bethesda
